particulars.description: The freehold property known as twin oaks, 71 platts lane, NW3 7NL as is registered at hm land registry under title number AGL109752. The freehold land known as land on the north side of platts lane as is registered at hm land registry under title number AGL109751. The freehold land known as land on the north side of platts lane as is registered at hm land registry under title number AGL109750. For further details of property being charged please refer to deed.
